# KPSC Master

KPSC Master is an AI-powered Kerala PSC preparation platform designed to help aspirants crack Kerala Government exams. It offers daily quizzes, real mock tests, live leaderboards, district rankings, study streaks, and instant AI doubt-solving with Malayalam & English support.

## USP & Features
- **Daily Smart Quiz**: Psychology-based questions that boost memory retention daily.
- **Timed Mock Tests**: timed simulations of LDC, LGS, Degree Level exams, excises, VEO, and teacher vacancies.
- **Syllabus & Subject Weightages**: Detailed breakdowns of exam patterns, SCERT math shortcuts, and Renaissance weightages.
- **District Rankings**: Leaderboards filtering scores by Kerala's 14 districts (Thiruvananthapuram, Kollam, Attingal, etc.).
- **Smart Revision Engine**: Spaced-repetition card decks.
- **Institute Portal**: Subdomain custom branding portals for 140+ offline coaching centers across Kerala.

## Technical Details
- Head Office: Attingal, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India.
- In-house product of Digital Product Solutions.

## Core Navigation / Pages
- Homepage: https://www.kpscmaster.in/ (Main landing page with registration)
- Mock Exams: https://www.kpscmaster.in/exams (Browse and take mock tests)
- Current Affairs: https://www.kpscmaster.in/current-affairs (Daily current affairs and news MCQs)
- Blog: https://www.kpscmaster.in/blog (PSC preparation strategies and calendars)
- Support / Contact: https://www.kpscmaster.in/contact (Email and phone numbers)

## Programmatic / Dynamic Landing Pages
KPSC Master hosts dedicated localized landing pages for Kerala PSC preparation across different exams and districts, including:
- `/kerala-psc-ldc-attingal` (LDC coaching resources in Attingal)
- `/kerala-psc-lgs-attingal` (LGS coaching resources in Attingal)
- `/psc-coaching-attingal` (General PSC Coaching in Attingal)
- `/kerala-psc-mock-test-thiruvananthapuram` (Mock test series for Thiruvananthapuram)
- `/kerala-psc-ldc-online-test` (LDC exam online simulator)
- `/kerala-psc-daily-quiz` (Daily smart quiz simulator)
